claim_boundary: This closure policy governs only SkillGuard Global Router maintenance work. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, external services, installed prompt freshness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.

hard_gates.condition: A global registry is claimed current.
hard_gates.required_disposition: closed_with_evidence only with current check-global-registry output

hard_gates.condition: A global prompt block is claimed installed or current.
hard_gates.required_disposition: closed_with_evidence only with current install-global-prompt or check-global-prompt output

residual_risk: Closure does not prove future prompt behavior after later skill or AGENTS file changes.
